item.title: The Issue Podcast: ‘Never enough’: Greens Senator David Shoebridge slams Australia’s defence spending as wasteful blowout
item.description: ‘It’s like pouring water into a sieve.’

item.title: Paris hasn’t sat in a regular classroom in years. Her mum says she’s never been better
item.description: ‘She’s probably got a better social life than me ... it’s amazing.’

item.title: What if Sydney’s newest suburbs looked different? Architects rethink the brick home
item.description: ‘We need to look at these houses differently in order to make them still functional, attractive, communities where we want to be.’

item.title: Brumby cull: Inside the fierce battle to protect or kill Australia’s feral horses
item.description: Helicopter culls, political pressure and clashing worldviews will collide again as one of the nation’s fiercest environmental fights is put back on the table.

item.title: Riverside Christian College’s 2024 dux never went to class. This is how they did it
item.description: Principal Michelle Gouge is the ultimate advocate for her school’s system, saying it bears little resemblance to what many Australians still imagine.

item.title: George Russell takes pole at Austrian GP despite yellow flag controversy as Oscar Piastri banks seventh
item.description: George Russell appeared to ignore stewards’ rulings before an investigation uncovered the truth.

item.title: Meghan Markle and Prince Harry’s plans to visit UK as family hits major security hiccup
item.description: A last-minute twist has cast doubt on Prince Harry’s plans to bring Meghan and their children back to the UK.

item.title: ‘I’m not sure how I will navigate life’: Rebecca Gibney grieves mother’s death
item.description: ‘I’m not sure how I will navigate life.’

item.title: Mourning mother petitions for corrections order overhaul after her son was tragically killed
item.description: His mum holds onto the final three words he yelled out to her from his car as we went to hang out with friends.

item.title: Powerball: Kiosk that sold winning $40m ticket revealed as search continues for new-found multi-millionaire
item.description: Lottery officials have named the outlet that sold the division one winning ticket from Thursday’s mammoth draw as they continue to search for the owner of the slip.

item.title: Anzac Day Test confirmed, Bledisloe Cup to change
item.description: Rugby Australia and New Zealand Rugby have announced that a third Bledisloe Cup Test will be played on Anzac Day in Brisbane next year.

item.title: Sydney Airport lost property and unclaimed Australia Post packages to be auctioned off
item.description: There are thousands of items including a wedding dress, circular saw and an air fryer.

item.title: Omoggle: the website rating people’s faces based on their ‘perceived sexual market value’
item.description: Experts have sounded the alarm over extreme risks to young users' safety and mental health.

item.title: Gary Glitter quizzed over alleged sex offences in London in the 1970s and 1980s
item.description: Gary Glitter was jailed for 16 years in 2015 for sexually abusing three schoolgirls between 1975 and 1980.

item.title: Middle East war: Iran attacks Bahrain and Kuwait following US strikes, threatens to halt talks
item.description: Efforts to reopen the Strait of Hormuz without Iran’s direct oversight sparked the crossfire now gripping the region.

item.title: ‘He gave up on me’: The real story behind Farmer Wants A Wife’s dramatic exit
item.description: Renae claimed several candid conversations with Dylan about her concerns never made it to air.

item.title: A system that was designed to help veterans became part of the problem. Now it is being overhauled
item.description: From spouses to children, the overhaul will also improve support for the people who stand beside veterans every day.

item.title: Broadway musical Waitress announces cancellation of Sydney performances a week after Beetlejuice axes tour
item.description: Just one city will now see the hit show starring Natalie Bassingthwaighte and Rob Mills.

item.title: New seafood labelling laws reveal where your fish really comes from
item.description: ‘It has been in testing for a while now.’

item.title: Eleven people killed in plane crash in northeastern France
item.description: ‘It was clear the impact had been too violent for there to be any survivors.’

item.title: Ben Stokes indulges in final act of Bazball hubris after bombshell exit from Test cricket
item.description: The England captain has announced his retirement during a Test match, admitting the Ashes defeat broke him.

item.title: Australia through to T20 World Cup semi-finals as Ellyse Perry stamps greatness again
item.description: ‘And her actions spoke louder than words as she just led from the front.’

item.title: Tanya Plibersek slams One Nation and Coalition after ‘modest’ poll U-turn
item.description: Fresh polling reveals Pauline Hanson’s popularity is slipping as Labor retakes the lead.

item.title: ‘Surprised’ Oscar Piastri sends reminder despite missing Austrian Grand Prix podium
item.description: The Aussie was happy ‘on a personal level’ and expects it won’t be the last time he’s in the mix.

item.title: Miranda Kerr and her husband Evan Spiegel wipe clean half a billion dollars worth of medical debt in the US
item.description: ‘If you happen to receive a letter in the mail, we want you to know it’s real.’

item.title: Singer Delta Goodrem speaks out after surprising next career move following Eurovision success
item.description: Delta has opened up about her decision to pause singing to compete in her next challenge.

item.title: Paul Hogan labels Pauline Hanson a ‘pelican’ over ‘racist’ monoculture stance
item.description: The iconic Aussie star took aim at the One Nation leader after she labelled him an ‘essential’ figure of Australian monoculture.

item.title: Friends star Courteney Cox reportedly splits from Snow Patrol musician Johnny McDaid after 10 years
item.description: The pair, who first met in 2013 at a house party, have reportedly been living ‘different lives’.

item.title: Hiker stunned after realising Princess Catherine was climbing Scotland’s Ben Nevis alongside him
item.description: ‘I was so happy. It was just mental.’

item.title: Six names revealed as Carlton begin coach interviews seven weeks after Michael Voss’ departure
item.description: A host of senior assistants are in the mix, but there is still a big ‘smoky’.

item.title: How a single online thread helped a Queensland grandfather uncover the family he never knew existed
item.description: ‘I’ve got a lot to be thankful for, that it’s opened up the way it has, and put us in touch with real people.’

item.title: Sam Mitchell set to cash in with ‘significant’ pay rise with new Hawthorn contract
item.description: Fresh details have emerged on the future of the Hawthorn coach.

item.title: Simon Peter Carman: Australian man had guns seized by police before moving overseas and allegedly murdering teen in Thailand
item.description: The 45-year-old allegedly killed a teen before stuffing her body into a suitcase.

item.title: Farmer Wants A Wife secret letter bombshell plus one farmer leaves the show
item.description: ‘You say one thing, but your actions say something else.’

item.title: Li-ion Energy sounds alarm over new threat months after major Maddington battery facility explosion
item.description: The inferno burned for hours and smothered suburbs in toxic smoke. Now there is a new threat.

item.title: Two suspects detained after five shot dead in Stade, northern Germany
item.description: The motive for the incident in Stade, close to the port city of Hamburg, was not immediately clear.

item.title: The online ancestry revolution helping Australians uncover who they really are
item.description: ‘There is so much information available out there, but it’s spread all around the world .. but you really can get taken on a journey about your ancestor.’

item.title: Six shot dead at mother-and-child shelter in northern Germany
item.description: Three people have been detained after multiple people were killed in a town in northern Germany.

item.title: Death toll jumps again as aftershocks rock Venezuela
item.description: The death toll from the country’s twin earthquakes has jumped to more than 1,700, as a 4.6-magnitude aftershock struck Caracas.

item.title: Ben Stokes to watch Ashes from ‘hospitality box’ after series defeat to New Zealand in farewell Test
item.description: The retiring England captain has finished his career on a sour note but insists he is ‘done’.

item.title: ‘Worst it’s been since the great depression’: Why the Australian wine industry is in peril
item.description: Crushing footage has emerged revealing the extent of the crisis in one of Australia’s most famous industries.

item.title: Drivers rush to get cheap petrol before fuel excise relief reduction as watchdog warns servos
item.description: Petrol stations have been put on notice as prices drop to lower than they’ve been since the 2021 pandemic.

item.title: Shaken Jannik Sinner overcomes mid-match injury to beat Miomir Kecmanovic at Wimbledon
item.description: The defending champion was left with a bloodied shoe before prevailing in a five-set epic.

item.title: Amazon sued by ACCC over Prime ad changes allegedly forcing Australians to pay extra for ad-free streaming
item.description: Australia’s consumer watchdog has accused the company of leaving the customers with no choice.

item.title: Singer turned swimmer Cody Simpson makes shock health admission: ‘I can’t walk or talk’
item.description: The 28-year-old former swimmer has been forced to pause the next chapter of his music comeback.

item.title: Ernst & Young staffer allegedly accesses Prime Minister Anthony Albanese’s bank account
item.description: The EY graduate has lost his job and will face court on Tuesday.

item.description: ‘To realise how rare it was, was quite scary and made me feel quite alone.’

item.description: ‘The issue has never been accommodation’.

item.title: Woman spends night in tree as tense standoff at Brisbane’s Kurilpa community garden continues
item.description: Emergency crews were forced to bring in a cherry picker after the overnight stay left her too weak to climb down.

item.title: The Morning Show: Australia's no. 1 Morning TV Show - Channel 7 | 7NEWS
item.description: The Morning Show with Larry Emdur and Kylie Gillies is the latest news, lifestyle, recipes, entertainment and weather. The Morning Show brings you a mix of news, entertainment, lifestyle and human interest stories - Weekdays from 9:00am across Australia.

item.title: Sunrise: Australia's No. 1 Breakfast Show - Channel 7 | 7NEWS
item.description: Sunrise with Natalie Barr, Matt Shirvington, Edwina Bartholomew, Sam Mac and Mark Beretta is the latest news, sport, entertainment and weather. Win with the Cash Cow. Australia's most popular brekky show - Weekdays from 5:30am, weekends from 7am on Channel 7.

item.title: Wimbledon stunned as Aussie Maya Joint rises to spoil Serena Williams’ comeback in first round
item.description: The American legend’s return has ended the same way her career did four years ago - with defeat to an Australian.

item.title: ‘Medical emergency’ unfolds before Australia reach T20 World Cup final with win over West Indies
item.description: The West Indies were shaken by the ‘scary’ scene as the Aussies suffered their own injury worry.

item.title: World No.5 Ben Shelton’s shock exit opens door for Alex de Minaur at Wimbledon
item.description: The Aussie copped a mixed bag of news either side of his dominant first-round win.

item.title: LeBron James quits Los Angeles Lakers to upend NBA hierarchy with Warriors and Cavaliers in the mix
item.description: Even at 41 years old the superstar is set to spark a bidding war to tilt the power balance again.

item.title: Venezuela earthquake: Death toll rises as rescue teams scour through rubble for unlikely survivors
item.description: The death toll is soaring as search efforts continue for thousands still missing.

item.title: Man fights for life after golf buggy fall on Hamilton Island
item.description: Multiple similar incidents have been recorded on the island in recent years.

item.title: France superstar Kylian Mbappe puts grieving coach Didier Deschamps first with heartfelt act in Round of 32 win
item.description: The World Cup great felt the love after returning from his mother’s funeral to lead his team to victory.

item.title: Cape Verde captain Ryan Mendes under investigation over rape allegation
item.description: FIFA has issued a statement, saying it takes ‘any allegation of misconduct extremely seriously’.

item.title: House prices plummet as tax changes trigger fiery debate on live TV
item.description: Housing Minister Clare O’Neil has defended the government’s tax reforms in a heated clash.

item.title: Dutch coach Ronald Koeman immediately quits to spend time with ill wife after World Cup heartbreak
item.description: ‘When someone you love is fighting a tough battle, your perspective changes.’

item.title: 2026 Mazda 6e GT review: Quick drive
item.description: Mazda has leveraged its Chinese links to give Australians an attainable electric successor to the Mazda 6. Has the gamble paid off?

item.title: Dark history behind Socceroos’ most recent clash with Egypt in 2010
item.description: A convicted match fixer claims to have rigged the controversial match.

item.title: US coach Mauricio Pochettino issues apology over ‘sad’ World Cup storm ahead of Bosnia clash
item.description: The big-name coach backed down as an American great stepped up, telling their next opponent not to even bother getting on the plane.

item.title: Indigenous-run business quotas target 'black cladding'
item.description: Strict new measures aim to stop companies pretending to be Indigenous to benefit from government programs.

item.title: Adelaide Crows under fire for always getting ahead of themselves
item.description: ‘I’m not sure why this club would think that they have the right.’

item.title: Ukraine launches major drone attack on Moscow, hitting Dubna Satellite Communications Centre and killing a baby
item.description: Volodomyr Zelensky last week announced a 40-day operation aimed at ‘compelling’ Russia to end the war.

item.title: Queensland police officer unleashes on three teens during arrest
item.description: ‘Who the hell do you think you are, mate?’

item.title: Serena Williams slammed for refusing to do media after first-round loss to Maya Joint at Wimbledon
item.description: ‘Has there ever been anyone more distasteful in defeat than Serena?’

item.title: Aussie Olympian Jock Landale agrees $20m deal to stick with Atlanta Hawks
item.description: The 30-year-old has transformed his fortunes just months after being thrown into a ‘panic’.

item.title: ‘Too low’: Tragic findings in devastating Avalon Airshow stunt
item.description: Veteran aerobatic stunt pilot Glenn Collins suffered life-changing injuries.

item.title: How the Solar Sharer Offer could cut your electricity bill with three hours of free power every day from today
item.description: Find out who’s eligible, how to sign up and how to maximise the savings.

item.title: Aussie murder suspect revealed Thai teenager’s cause of death says top cop
item.description: Further details of the 17-year-old’s final moments have emerged.

item.title: Unfiltered: Why Kane Cornes would have called Kane Cornes ‘selfish’
item.description: An ‘unbelievable irony’ has emerged with the star commentator put on the spot with a burning question.

item.title: Melbourne Cup-winning trainers Anthony and Sam Freedman banned over race-day treatment
item.description: A tribunal has taken action after two horses were scratched by stewards last year.

item.title: Essendon’s defensive issues laid bare in ‘worst clip of the year’
item.description: ‘How is this happening?’

item.title: Karl Stefanovic dumped from Gold FM radio show with Eddie McGuire a week after Nine axing: Reports
item.description: The fallout from the embattled former TV star’s independent podcast is continuing.

item.title: Peugeot dumped by Australian distributor, but Stellantis says French brand will stick around here
item.description: Parent company Stellantis says it'll maintain continuity of distribution for the Peugeot brand after importer Inchcape drops it in Australia.

item.title: South Australia swim spot closed for 90 days as fisheries try to save cuttlefish
item.description: Authorities warn breaches could attract heavy penalties including big fines as they try to save a marine creature.

item.title: Middle East war: Iran won’t join US for peace talks in Doha
item.description: Both sides had agreed on a fresh round of negotiations to try to strike lasting peace.

item.title: Raiders star Tom Starling lashes out at Ethan Sanders critics: ‘Doing a great job’
item.description: ‘I know it’s probably easy to point a finger.’

item.title: 2026 Jaecoo J8 SHS prices: Chinese large SUV gets seven seats, PHEV powertrain
item.description: Omoda Jaecoo has followed sister brand Chery in launching a large, seven-seat plug-in hybrid SUV in Australia.

item.title: Why NRL’s toughest man Payne Haas will feel ‘hopeless’ in NSW camp
item.description: Ahead of the State of Origin decider, Payne Haas has conflicted feelings ... and it’s for a very good reason.

item.title: Severe weather warnings issued for NSW, Victoria and TAS as floods and storms hit southeast
item.description: Several states have been issued with damaging wind and flood warning.

item.title: 2026 Leapmotor B05 prices: Chinese brand's new small electric hatch undercuts Toyota Corolla
item.description: Australia's growing fleet of small electric hatchbacks from China will soon include the rear-wheel drive Leapmotor B05, due here in August.

item.title: Teen girl trapped for hours as ute crashes over steep embankment near Tamworth
item.description: The driver needed to be airlifted from the rough terrain and flown to hospital in Sydney

item.title: Broncos veteran Ben issues warning to teammate Josiah Karapani after latest indiscretion
item.description: ‘You can’t keep making those mistakes or you are going to find your way out of this club pretty quickly.’

item.title: The new road rules and penalties now in effect on Australian roads
item.description: Here are all the changes to road-related costs as of July 1.

item.title: Illegal e-motorbike rider thrown 20 metres in high‑speed crash in front of Adelaide police
item.description: The rider crashed into a car right in front of emergency services.
